name: circle-readiness-agent
description: Evaluate open-source API repositories for x402 and Circle Agent Marketplace readiness, then draft maintainer-ready adoption issues.

scripts.analyze:firecrawl: node dist/src/cli.js --repo ../.ignored-upstream/firecrawl --name Firecrawl --url https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl --issue-url https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl/issues/3279 --out reports/firecrawl-circle-readiness.md --json-out reports/firecrawl-circle-readiness.json
